title: ROMANIA enforcement action against Tensa Art Design S.A (20,000)
summary: Insufficient cooperation with supervisory authority The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 20,000 onTensa Art Design S.A.The DPA began investigating the controller's data processing activities, but the controller failed to respond to the DPA's requests. Legal basis: Art. 58 (1) a), e) GDPR, Art. 83 (5) e) GDPR.
dedupKey: romania enforcement action against tensa art design s a 20 000|2026-02-05
